title: Mob Captains Mod Compat
description: Custom support to the Mob Captains mod/datapack. Includes Creeper/Enderman Overhaul, Mutant Monsters, mob variants mods, and many more.
body:
**Requires:**  
- [Mob Captains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-captains) (base mod/datapack)  

**About:**  
I needed more modded support for [Mob Captains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mob-captains), so I set it up based on [the developer's documentation](https://github.com/ps-dps/MobCaptains/issues/48). Adds spawns for modded mobs **without** altering rates or drops. Shouldn't have any compatibility issues.  

---

### Supported Mods 

**Mob Captains' defaults:**  
- Some Vanilla mobs  

**Additional Mods:**  
- [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) → All creeper variants  
- [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) → All enderman variants  
- [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) → All illagers  
- [Mob Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/fryc-mob-variants) → All variants  
- [Wandering Orc](https://modrinth.com/mod/wandering-orc) → Stronger orcs only  
- [Mutant Monsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutant-monsters) → All mutants *(excluding friendly)*  
- [Mutants and Zombies](https://modrinth.com/mod/mutants-and-zombies) → All zombies  
- [Nemo's Creatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-creatures) → All hostile mobs  
- [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry) → Non-boss/miniboss mobs  
- [It Takes a Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage) → All illagers  
- [Variants & Ventures](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-and-ventures) → All mobs
